_meta.purpose: Structured business rules not captured by contraindications.json — clinical sufficiency criteria, split night decision factors, COB determination, scope rules, age transitions.
_meta.notes: Supplements contraindications.json (hard/soft stops, titration prerequisites, pediatric restrictions). Operational thresholds live in facility_config.json. Payer-specific exceptions live in individual payer JSONs.

clinical_sufficiency._description: Most payers require clinical sufficiency for authorization. 4 pathways to qualification.

criteria_set.name: obesity
criteria_set.definition: BMI > 30 or neck circumference > 17" male / 16" female

A_observed_apneas.description: Observed apneas by bed partner → sufficient regardless of other criteria

nv_medicaid_only.description: Call patient to administer ESS/STOP-BANG by phone

split_night_criteria._description: Split night study (95810 + 95811 same night) decision factors. Evaluated when both diagnostic and titration are in scope.

eligibility_requirements.ahi_note: AHI >= 20 events/hour during diagnostic portion (configurable in facility_config.json)
eligibility_requirements.locality_note: Patient must be LOCAL (service area cities in facility_config.json). Split night inefficient if patient traveled far.
eligibility_requirements.prior_pap_factor: If patient has prior PAP history, split is more appropriate (they'll likely need titration)

cash_payment_gate.description: Cash/pending patients selecting split night must pass through payment gate

payer_coverage_check.description: Some payers don't cover split night — removed in M3 before reaching M4

scope_rules._description: Scope defines the ceiling. Physician's order determines maximum test set. System can only narrow scope, never expand it.

FULL.description: All codes available: HST, PSG, split, titration

DIAGNOSTIC.description: PSG and HST only (no titration unless split)

UNKNOWN.description: Pre-assessment runs, full scope assumed when order arrives

scope_rules.scope_contraction_path: FULL → remove contraindicated tests → remove payer-excluded tests → tiebreaker if multiple remain
scope_rules.scope_expansion_rule: NEVER automatic. If insurance covers PSG but not HST and order says HST_LOCKED, system generates PENDING_NEW_ORDER — does not upgrade without physician consent.

cob_rules._description: Coordination of Benefits when 2+ insurance plans detected. NAIC determination order.

federal_overrides.rule: Tricare is secondary to employer-sponsored plans

naic_determination_order.rule: Patient's own plan is primary over plan where patient is dependent
Active employee plan is primary over COBRA/retired plan
Custody rules for dependent children (custodial parent → custodial step-parent → non-custodial parent)
Birthday rule — parent whose birthday falls earlier in calendar year has primary (NOT older parent)

after_determination.primary_oon: Standard OON stop applies. Secondary being INN does NOT override.
after_determination.primary_inn_secondary_oon: Process under primary with OON secondary noted in output

age_transition_rules._description: Age-based transition logic for patients approaching key birthdays.

soft_stop_approaching_2.processing: Full pipeline executes with pediatric parameters (95782/95783, HST NOT allowed). Scheduling BLOCKED until birthday.
soft_stop_approaching_2.on_birthday: Automatic re-entry at M6_START to regenerate output with scheduling unblocked. No reprocessing needed.

age_transition_rules.missing_dob: Skip age calculation (cannot calculate without DOB)
age_transition_rules.missing_name_with_dob: Still calculate age. ALERT_MISSING_PATIENT_NAME fires but age logic not bypassed.

payer_identification_sequence._description: Sequential payer identification: name → format → signals.

step_1_name.action: Load payer JSON + criteria files, validate member ID format, gather plan type signals

step_2_format.condition: Name not recognized (OCR garbled, unknown carrier)
step_2_format.method: Check member ID format (3-letter alpha prefix = BCBS, MBI pattern = Medicare FFS, H-prefix = Humana)

step_3_fallback.condition: Neither name nor format identify payer

missing_member_id.condition: Payer identified but no member ID extracted
missing_member_id.action: Skip format validation, fire ALERT_MISSING_MEMBER_ID, continue to signals

severity_meanings.STOP: Nothing else can happen until resolved
severity_meanings.PENDING: Waiting for specific info with a re-entry point

flag_design_principles.deduplication: If multiple modules remove same test, output shows one flag with all reasons listed
flag_design_principles.no_contradiction_rule: STOP flag cannot coexist with READY_TO_SCHEDULE. Highest severity determines status.
